item.description:

Use it to: * /sche…

item.title:
That browser version of LiteParse is available here: https://t.co/CGI64y1oMI
Detailed notes on how ...
item.description:
That browser version of LiteParse is available here: https://t.co/CGI64y1oMI
Detailed notes on how I built it using Claude Code (running for an hour) on my blog: https://t.co/J0BSpgwHfl
--- @simonw | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 129
item.author: @simonw

item.title: LiteParse is really neat! It does a great job of extracting text from annoying layouts in PDFs (mult...
item.description:
LiteParse is really neat! It does a great job of extracting text from annoying layouts in PDFs (multiple columns for example)
It's only available as a Node.js CLI app, so I vibe-coded up this version that runs in a browser https://t.co/xdawwDV7Kq
--- @simonw | ❤️ 8 | 🔁 2 | 💬 4 | 👁 579
item.author: @simonw

item.title: @simonw Already fully supported in Lisette - but thanks anyway! :D https://t.co/r7cAhMxXEG
item.author: @jeremyphoward

item.title: Wheels Meet Legs: The Hybrid Bipedal #Robot Conquering Rough Terrain and Human Spaces via @ZappyZapp...
item.description:
Wheels Meet Legs: The Hybrid Bipedal #Robot Conquering Rough Terrain and Human Spaces via @ZappyZappy7
#Robotics #Engineering #Innovation #Technology https://t.co/D3vuSjXShi
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 2 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 83
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title: As part of @NASA’s @SpaceX Crew-13 mission, four crew members from three space agencies will launch ...
item.description:
As part of @NASA’s @SpaceX Crew-13 mission, four crew members from three space agencies will launch no earlier than mid-September to the International Space Station for a long-duration science expedition.
NASA astronauts Jessica Watkins and Luke Delaney will serve as spacecraft commander and pilot, respectively. They will be joined by CSA (Canadian Space Agency) astronaut Joshua Kutryk and Roscosmos cosmonaut Sergey Teteryatnikov, who will serve as mission specialists. https://t.co/Qg4yFq89sb
--- @Space_Station | ❤️ 54 | 🔁 12 | 💬 4 | 👁 11282
item.author: @Space_Station

item.title: gpt5.5 纸面指标没得说，确实是旗舰，何况还有 5.5 pro 跟 gpt image 2 一起训练，生图直接免费，把谷歌那边也搞了 这次 openai 真的要翻盘了 https://t.co/R...
item.description:
gpt5.5 纸面指标没得说，确实是旗舰，何况还有 5.5 pro 跟 gpt image 2 一起训练，生图直接免费，把谷歌那边也搞了 这次 openai 真的要翻盘了 https://t.co/RDlTodEvGH
--- @oran_ge | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 211
item.author: @oran_ge

item.title: If you can’t bet them, have them join you.
item.author: @tunguz

item.title: gpt5.5 最大的进步竟然是学会了说人话，opus 4.7 却变得不会说人话了… 并且 gpt 5.5 编程能力更强了，这证明说人话和编程能力并不矛盾… 并且 gpt 5.5 速度也很快，这证明了，...
item.description:
gpt5.5 最大的进步竟然是学会了说人话，opus 4.7 却变得不会说人话了… 并且 gpt 5.5 编程能力更强了，这证明说人话和编程能力并不矛盾… 并且 gpt 5.5 速度也很快，这证明了，模型大不要紧，显卡好就行（就像 kimi 海外版速度是国内的2倍） A 社这波把 Mythos 包装成神秘核弹、却在 opus 4.7 翻车，也许就是 OpenAI 的翻盘点了
最后 gpt5.5 大幅涨价了，相比 gpt 5.4 价格直接翻倍，超越 opus 4.7 成为当下最贵模型 gpt5.4: 我依然是性价比之王，只有我能稳稳地接住你 🖐️
--- @oran_ge | ❤️ 4 | 🔁 0 | 💬 3 | 👁 895
item.author: @oran_ge
